description: A web-based LLM-connected (via OS clipboard) code and documentation editor designed for "vibe coding": dictated, natural language prompting with purely AI written code, with "visibility controls" for building prompts of user-selected code and documentation to the LLM

app.description: The main application orchestrator. Initializes all other components and handles global state and events.

core.description: Core, shared, framework-agnostic utilities like UIHelpers and DialogBox.

protocol.description: Components responsible for parsing and processing the update protocols (CodeParser, UpdatePatcher, etc.).

editor.description: Manages the multi-segment CodeMirror editor instances for a single file tab.

fileTree.description: Manages the display and interaction with the project's file and directory structure.

tabs.description: A generic, reusable component for managing a tabbed interface.

playground.description: A demonstration and testing area for editor features and components.

harnesses.description: Standalone HTML files for testing individual components in isolation.
